caption: The video features a presentation titled "The DARPA OPS-5G Program: A Collaboration between Government and the Open Source Community," delivered by Michael August from the United States Department of the Navy on April 12th, 2022. The presentation is part of the Open Networking & Edge Executive Forum, hosted by The Linux Foundation, LFNetworking, and LFEdge. The slide shown is the title slide, which includes a network diagram in the background, symbolizing connectivity and collaboration. The presenter appears in a small window on the top right corner, likely discussing the objectives and details of the DARPA OPS-5G program, emphasizing its focus on integrating government initiatives with open-source community efforts to advance 5G technology. The presentation is approved for public release, as indicated by the distribution statement at the bottom of the slide.
